text_preview:
## AUG-NOV 1972. 

## Testimonials from EZALDIVAR HUMBERTO BORGHI and CATARINA CARVALHO TEIXEIRA.

## 
EZALDIVAR HUMBERTO BORGHI testimonial summary:

In August 1972, on a Saturday night when he was returning from the city of Ubirajara-SP to the city of Galia-SP, at around 9:30 pm, Mr. Borghi was driving his car along the Intermunicipal Road Ubirajara-Galia, near the Figueirinha Farm about 2 km from the bridge over Ribeirão Vermelho, when it “saw a light on the road”. Mr. Borghi was surprised by the fact that, according to him, there was no traffic on the site, mainly because it was a little r
summary: Multiple witnesses including teachers on the Ubirajara-Galia road in SP reported recurrent orange-red ball of light Aug–Nov 1972; it emitted a spotlight beam and seemed to follow vehicles.
